ValidationRule.description: PR Creation must be complete before the story can be sent to SIT
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Sent to SIT"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), PR_Creation_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: PR Creation must be completed and the PR approved before moving to "Sent to SIT". Please tick the PR Creation Complete checkbox first.
